prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为14874→16720→15929→15214→18234，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年较2024年后移约3020名，为近五年最大降幅，基准位次约182 34名；2021–2024年物理类计划均为44人，2025年扩至52人；2026年计划仍为52人，与2025年持平，未进一步扩招，对竞争缓解作用有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 该校在声誉 舆情文件中未出现明显负面或正面事件，声誉平稳；抖音热度总排名第25位（较热），综合热度约183万，短视频平台有一定关注度；无投档断档历史记录；第 五轮学科评估中广；广西大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第94名稳步上升至2026年第86名，排名持续提升，反映学校综合实力增强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度 持续偏高（2024年），相关专业报考竞争加剧；福建省物理类考生从2021年11.7万持续增长至2025年19.2万，2026年估算约20.4万人，考生 规模扩大推高竞争；广西大学位于广西南宁，与福建省地理距离适中，非本省高校，地域偏好中性；该校在福建省物理类招生计 划近年稳定在44–52人，占比不高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、福建省物理类考生持续增长约6%等因素，竞争压力总体加 大，但2025年已出现较大后移，2026年回调空间有限；预测2026年物理类最低位次约18284名，区间17784–18784名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 14874 → 16720 → 15929 → 15214 → 18234, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2025, it shifted backward by about 3020 places compared to 2024, the largest drop in the past five years, with a baseline ranking of approximately 18234. From 2021 to 2024, the Physics Category enrollment plan was 44 students each year, expanding to 52 in 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 52, unchanged from 2025, with no further expansion, offering limited relief to competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: The university has no significant negative or positive events in reputation and public opinion files, maintaining a stable reputation. Its Douyin popularity ranks 25th overall (relatively popular), with a comprehensive popularity of about 1.83 million, indicating some attention on short video platforms. There is no history of admission gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it received a broad rating. Guangxi University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science China University Ranking has steadily risen from 94th in 2021 to 86th in 2026, reflecting continuous improvement in overall strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Electronic Information/Communication have consistently high social popularity (as of 2024), intensifying competition for related majors. The number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian Province has grown from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, with an estimated 204,000 in 2026, expanding the candidate pool and increasing competition. Guangxi University is located in Nanning, Guangxi, with moderate geographical distance from Fujian Province. It is not a local university, so regional preference is neutral. Its enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian has been stable at 44–52 students in recent years, accounting for a low proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the enrollment plan for 2026 being unchanged from 2025, and the continuous growth of Fujian Physics Category examinees by about 6%, overall competitive pressure is increasing. However, since a large backward shift occurred in 2025, the room for adjustment in 2026 is limited. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 18284, with a range of 17784–18784.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 17784–18784, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 17784), you can prioritize competitive majors like Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 18784), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
